creator: mattea@rescomp.berkeley.edu
text:
Is this still a problem?  I am running rt-3.8.6 with graphviz-2.20.3 on
FreeBSD 7.1-RELEASE-p13 and charts display fine with no special
configuration.

-- 
Matthew Ekstrand-Abueg
Unix Systems Administrator
Network Infrastructure, RSSP-IT
UC Berkeley
